title: That Boi's Megamon
description: Collection of new Mega Evolutions I created for Cobblemon + Showdown.
body:
# That Boi's **Megamon**
### _A Cobblemon + Showdown addon that adds new Mega Evolutions to the game._

Currently, this Cobblemon addon adds new Mega Forms to:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


- Mega Volcarona ![Volcaronaite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/339122c122cbbfc7789448bf46b3ac58750ad5c3.png)
- Mega Mew ![Mewite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/388589290f5254dd160df95bfff641cfe4bd3c18.png)

</details>

-----

**INSTALLATION NOTICE!**

To add this addon to Cobblemon, please install the file as both a Datapack and a Resource pack.

Also, please install this addon with Cobblemon and Showdown or else it will not work.
